_comment: Phase 12 mutation testing — see CLAUDE.md §5.3 + docs/MUTATION_REPORT.md.
_ratchet_comment: Break threshold is the current measured mutation score (floored). Any PR that lowers it fails. To RAISE the baseline, close surviving mutants (see docs/MUTATION_REPORT.md top-gaps list), re-run `bun run mutation`, and update `break` here in the same PR. `low` is a +3 ratchet target (warns, does not fail). `high` is a +8 stretch goal.
vitest_comment: Stryker's vitest runner auto-detects vitest.config.ts from cwd.
inPlace_comment: Skip the tsconfig-preprocessor (and its `import('typescript')`) — we only run Stryker in CI and git worktrees, both of which are disposable, so a mid-run crash cannot damage real sources.
